query:
INSERT INTO task_categories (name, slug, icon, description) VALUES
('Surveys', 'surveys', 'ClipboardList', 'Complete surveys and earn cash rewards'),
('Watch Videos', 'videos', 'Play', 'Watch videos and earn money'),
('Install Apps', 'apps', 'Smartphone', 'Install and try apps to earn rewards'),
('Micro Tasks', 'micro-tasks', 'Zap', 'Quick small tasks for instant earnings'),
('Ad Clicks', 'ad-clicks', 'MousePointer', 'View ads and websites to earn'),
('Content Tasks', 'content-tasks', 'PenTool', 'Social media and content creation tasks');

INSERT INTO tasks (categoryId, title, description, reward, estimatedMinutes, isActive, isFeatured, difficulty) VALUES
(1, 'Complete a 5-minute survey about shopping habits', 'Share your opinions about online shopping. Quick and easy survey.', 0.5000, 5, true, true, 'easy'),
(1, 'Health & Wellness Survey', 'Answer questions about your health and wellness routine.', 0.8000, 8, true, false, 'easy'),
(1, 'Technology Usage Survey', 'Tell us about how you use technology in your daily life.', 1.2000, 12, true, true, 'medium'),
(1, 'Financial Habits Survey', 'Share your financial habits and preferences.', 1.5000, 15, true, false, 'medium'),
(2, 'Watch a 30-second product ad', 'Watch a short advertisement and earn instantly.', 0.1000, 1, true, true, 'easy'),
(2, 'Watch a 3-minute tutorial video', 'Watch a helpful tutorial and rate it.', 0.3000, 3, true, false, 'easy'),
(2, 'Watch a 10-minute documentary clip', 'Watch an interesting documentary segment.', 0.7000, 10, true, false, 'medium'),
(2, 'Watch and review a product demo', 'Watch a product demonstration and provide feedback.', 0.9000, 10, true, true, 'medium'),
(3, 'Install and open a free game app', 'Download, install and open a mobile game.', 1.0000, 5, true, true, 'easy'),
(3, 'Try a new productivity app for 5 minutes', 'Install and use a productivity app for at least 5 minutes.', 1.5000, 10, true, false, 'easy'),
(3, 'Install a VPN app and connect once', 'Download and connect to a VPN service once.', 2.0000, 10, true, true, 'medium'),
(4, 'Like and follow a social media page', 'Follow a brand page and like their latest post.', 0.2000, 2, true, true, 'easy'),
(4, 'Sign up for a free newsletter', 'Register with your email for a newsletter.', 0.5000, 3, true, false, 'easy'),
(4, 'Test a website and report issues', 'Visit a website and report any usability issues.', 1.0000, 10, true, false, 'medium'),
(4, 'Translate a short paragraph', 'Translate a 50-word paragraph to another language.', 0.8000, 5, true, false, 'medium'),
(5, 'Click and view 10 sponsored links', 'Visit 10 sponsored websites for 30 seconds each.', 0.5000, 10, true, true, 'easy'),
(5, 'View 5 banner advertisements', 'View and interact with banner ads.', 0.3000, 5, true, false, 'easy'),
(6, 'Post about a product on TikTok', 'Create a short TikTok video mentioning a product.', 3.0000, 20, true, true, 'hard'),
(6, 'Write a product review on Google', 'Write an honest review for a local business.', 1.5000, 10, true, false, 'medium'),
(6, 'Share a post on Facebook', 'Share a sponsored post on your Facebook profile.', 0.5000, 2, true, true, 'easy');

INSERT INTO contests (title, type, prizePool, startDate, endDate, status) VALUES
('Daily Earning Contest', 'daily', 200.0000, NOW(), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY), 'active'),
('Weekly $2000 Prize Contest', 'weekly', 2000.0000, NOW(), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY), 'active');
